name: pi-flow-skills
description: BMAD-inspired sprint workflow for Pi with parent + parallel sub-agent orchestration and long-term memory. Story/dev/review phases fan out ephemeral Pi sub-agents (research, prior-art, coupling, tests, adversarial reviewers) and synthesize. Epic closeout condenses memory into .agents/memory/ for cold-restart 6-12 months later.
author: Edouard CLAUDE <edouard@squirrel.fr> (https://github.com/edouard-claude)
